name: Gas-rich unsettled candidate
plain_english_summary: Mostly gas, few stars, low density, and sprawling H I keep the response dimmer nearly closed.
claim_boundary_note: Educational example only; real unsettled systems require resolved gas maps.

name: Transition galaxy
plain_english_summary: Stars are building, the disk is condensing, and the response begins to open but remains limited.
claim_boundary_note: Transition systems are expected to be the hardest cases to classify cleanly.

name: Mature organized spiral
plain_english_summary: A compact, stellar-rich, settled disk opens the governor and expresses a stronger rotational response.
claim_boundary_note: High activation here is a teaching state, not a fitted history for a specific galaxy.

name: UGC07125: quarantined example
role: quarantined cautionary object — not a clean example
plain_english_summary: UGC07125 is useful as a cautionary target because its H I and stellar geometry are side-dependent.
claim_boundary_note: UGC07125 is quarantined and not a clean juvenile prototype.

name: DDO161
plain_english_summary: DDO161 is the cleaner forming contrast: gas-rich, extended, and expected to have weak activation.
claim_boundary_note: Decisive interpretation requires direct resolved H I organization measurements.
